name: pm-legal
description: Legal skills: Contract Review, NDA Analyser, Legal Brief, Compliance Checklist, Privacy Policy Drafter, Demand Letter, Clause Explainer. Flag risks in contracts and NDAs, draft legal memos in IRAC format, generate GDPR/SOC 2/FCA compliance checklists, draft plain-language privacy policies and demand letters, and decode any contract clause. Not a substitute for qualified legal advice.
